critic_raw:
CRITIQUE:

1. LOW-VOLUME STORE MAPE GAP: 19.4% MAPE in the bottom quintile is materially above the acceptable range for perishable autonomous ordering. These stores require either restricted deployment or a separate performance improvement effort before full autonomy is appropriate.

2. NO HUMAN OVERRIDE — ARCHITECTURAL GAP: Eliminating all override capability for perishable goods is operationally risky. Exception handling for extraordinary demand events and model errors in time-sensitive perishable categories is a minimum requirement.

The deployment needs tiered store segmentation and minimum exception handling. The model as deployed to high-volume stores with strong performance is appropriate.

Verdict: MIXED.
